scope.target: Create Codex runtime skill wrappers for the remaining primary skills
constraints: Avoid duplicating full skill bodies or full reference content
non_goals: No migration of every reference file into canonical storage yet

inputs.architecture_target: Expand the proven Codex runtime wrapper pattern to the remaining main skills
user_constraints: Organize the remaining skills after the first Codex skill pilot

steps: Created Codex runtime wrappers for the remaining primary skills
Pointed each wrapper back to its canonical skill spec
Kept quick start instructions concise and repository-specific
validation: Each primary skill now has a Codex runtime SKILL.md
Each runtime wrapper points to a canonical skill spec
deferred_items: Add runtime wrapper references only where they provide real value
Decide whether to generate these wrappers automatically in the future

results.summary: Expanded Codex runtime skill wrappers to the remaining primary skills.
